title: Homeland Security
text:
Pledge2Protect is the official call-to-action of the Know2Protect campaign. Our goal is to create a global movement to galvanize society to take action and prevent crimes of exploitation targeting kids and teens online. Everyone has a place in this fight, and Pledge2Protect is an opportunity to help protect children, learn more and educate communities about how to prevent this crime.
It’s important for kids and teens to understand how to stay safe on the internet. K2P Kids & Teens is our home for ages 10 and up to learn more about staying safe online. For resources for children under 10, please visit the National Center for Missing and Exploited Children.
